query.title: Query OSINT Services
query.placeholder: Enter email, IP, domain, URL, or hash...

serviceDescriptions.hibp: Check if email addresses have been compromised in data breaches.
serviceDescriptions.intelx: Search dark web leaks, Tor, I2P, and public data sources.
serviceDescriptions.leakix: Search exposed servers and leaked databases.
serviceDescriptions.virustotal: Analyze URLs, domains, IPs, and file hashes with 70+ AV engines.
serviceDescriptions.urlhaus: Search malicious URLs and payloads from abuse.ch.
serviceDescriptions.phishtank: Verify whether a URL is a known phishing site.
serviceDescriptions.urlscan: Scan and analyse websites for malicious content.
serviceDescriptions.shodan: Search internet-connected devices, open ports, and services.
serviceDescriptions.censys: Search internet-wide scan data for hosts and certificates.
serviceDescriptions.securitytrails: Historical DNS records, WHOIS, and subdomain enumeration.
serviceDescriptions.abuseipdb: IP reputation and abuse report database.
serviceDescriptions.alienvault: Open threat intelligence community with pulses and IOCs.
